recommendations.problem: CloudFormation stack stuck in failed state preventing forward deployment

solution.command:
# Via AWS Console:
# 1. Navigate to CloudFormation console
# 2. Select the failed stack
# 3. Choose "Continue update rollback"
# 4. Select resources to skip
# 5. Confirm skip operation

# Via AWS CLI:
aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback \
  --stack-name <stack-name> \
  --resources-to-skip <canary-resource-logical-id>
solution.description: Use CloudFormation console or CLI to skip failing resources
solution.step: Skip failing canary resources in CloudFormation

solution.command:
# Option 1: Using AWS CLI
# Create dry run to test runtime compatibility
aws synthetics start-canary-dry-run \
  --canary-name <canary-name> \
  --runtime-version <new-runtime-version>

# Check dry run results
aws synthetics get-canary-runs \
  --canary-name <canary-name> \
  --dry-run-id <dry-run-id-from-previous-command>

# Option 2: Using CloudFormation DryRunAndUpdate
# Add to your CloudFormation template:
Resources:
  MyCanary:
    Type: AWS::Synthetics::Canary
    Properties:
      Name: canary-name
      RuntimeVersion: new-runtime-version
      DryRunAndUpdate: true  # Performs dry run before updating
      Code:
        Handler: canary.handler
        S3Bucket: bucket
        S3Key: updated-canary-script.zip
solution.description: Test canary with new runtime version without affecting production
solution.expected_outcome: Dry run succeeds, confirming runtime compatibility before deployment
solution.step: Validate runtime upgrade using Synthetics dry run

solution.description: Update production canary after successful dry run validation
solution.expected_outcome: Canary executes successfully with the validated runtime version
solution.step: Deploy canary with validated runtime version

recommendations.title: Skip failing CloudFormation resources to unblock deployment

root_cause: CloudFormation attempted to roll back a canary update to its previous runtime version, but that version has since been deprecated by the Synthetics service. The UpdateCanary API rejects deprecated runtime versions with a 400 error, which causes the CloudFormation rollback itself to fail, leaving the stack in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state. The stack cannot move forward (original update failed) or backward (rollback target is deprecated).
symptoms: CloudFormation deployment fails with deprecated runtime version error
CloudFormation stack stuck in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state
Unable to rollback to previous runtime version
Canary enters unhealthy state after runtime upgrade attempt
title: CloudFormation rollback failure due to runtime deprecation
